name: Shadow Garden
description:
You saw em. Now they see you. Seven killers in the moonlight, and you're the only loose end. Try to run? They'll cut you down. Try to fight? You're dead. Your only shot is to talk your way out..... or maybe into their secret war. They ain't asking twice. Whats its going to be?

Deepseek reccomended.
creator: Fopv
